Who I Am

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR 🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT 🏢 FOUNDER & CEO 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH ❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH 🚀 STRATEGIC EMPIRE ARCHITECT ✅ START GLOBAL MISSION ON WHATSAPP 📞 🏠 KINGDOM HOME HUB 📩 VIP CONTACT HUB 🌍 GLOBAL ECOSYSTEM 🎓 BINDRA MENTORSHIP 💎 SOLUTIONS HUB 💰 YOUTAG BUSINESS PLAN 🔥 IDP STRATEGY 🚀 LEADS GURU ACCESS GLOBAL MISSION 2026

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

0+ ENTREPRENEURS MENTORED 0+ YEARS OF ELITE EXPERIENCE 0% SECURE GLOBAL ECOSYSTEMS AUTHORIZED PARTNER | ID: BIRK076336 | GLOBAL WORLD MISSION 2026

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

🏰

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

ESTABLISHED 2024 | THE ORIGIN STORY

2016 – 2021: SURVIVING THE DARKNESS

JUNE 2016 MEIN JAB MAINE SHURUAT KI, TOH MERE PAAS SIRF ZERO KNOWLEDGE THI. MAINE EK IRON FACTORY MEIN KAAM SHURU KIYA, JAHAN MAHAUL NEGATIVE THA, PAR MERI WILL-POWER LOHE SE BHI MAZBOOT THI. EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR BANNE KA SAPNA WAHIN SE SHURU HUA.

"SENIORS AUR OWNER KI NEGATIVE BAATEIN SUN-SUN KAR EK WAQT AISA AAYA JAB MUJHE LAGA MERA FUTURE ANDHERA HAI. LEKIN EK EXPERT GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAHI HAI JO HAR MUSHKIL KO OPPORTUNITY MEIN BADAL DE."

🔥 THE SPARK OF HOPE: DR. VIVEK BINDRA SIR KA WO MANTRA: "PROBLEM PAR FOCUS KAROGE TOH PROBLEM BADI LAGEGI, SOLUTION PAR FOCUS KAROGE TOH RASTE DIKHENGE." US DIN MUJHE JEENE KA NAYA RASTA MIL GAYA.

GROUND-LEVEL EMPIRE BUILDING

🏗️ GROUND OPERATIONS

MAINE SEEKHA GAADI KA KAANTA, TOLL AUR EXCISE MANAGEMENT. HAR CHOTA KAAM KIYA TAQI EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI TARAH BUSINESS KA ASLI BASE SAMAJH SAKUN.

📈 MANAGEMENT MASTERY

WAHIN MAINE TALLY SEEKHI AUR GST HANDLE KIYA. FACTORY NE MUJHE ZERO SE MANAGEMENT LEVEL TAK PAHUNCHA DIYA. YEH EK TRUE GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI BUNIYAAD THI.

BHAGWAN NE MERI SUNI... AUR WAHI "SOLUTION MINDSET" 2021 MEIN CORPORATE BANKING KE RASTE KHOL GAYA. THE EVOLUTION INTO A GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAS UNSTOPPABLE.

GLOBAL WORLD MISSION 2026

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

📈

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

THE CORPORATE BREAKTHROUGH | JAN 2021

JAN 2021: THE BANKING SECTOR LEAP

BHAGWAN NE MERI SUNI AUR JANUARY 2021 MEIN MAINE DURGAPURA (JAIPUR) KE EK BADE BANK MEIN SALES OFFICER (LRO) JOIN KIYA. YEH MERI LIFE KA EK MUKHYA MODD THA JAHAN MAINE EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI TARAH SOCHNA SHURU KIYA.

BANKING SECTOR MEIN JIS LADKE KO BOLNA NAHI AATA THA, AAJ WO HIGH-LEVEL FINANCE AUR BADE CUSTOMERS KI DUNIYA MEIN THA. EK EXPERT GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR BANNE KI TRAINING MERI USSI SALES OFFICER KI JOURNEY MEIN CHUPI THI.

THE CORPORATE REALIZATION: "JOB AAPKO EK 10-TO-6 LOOP MEIN PHASA DETI HAI. EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAHI HAI JO BRANCH KI DEEWARON KO TOD KAR POORI DUNIYA (GLOBAL WORLD) KO APNA MARKET BANAYE."

ELITE PROFESSIONAL MASTERY

🏦 SALES & FINANCE OFFICER

item.title: 👑 ABOUT THE MISSION 🌍
item.dc:creator: RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL
item.content:encoded:
Who I Am

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

🙏 MOST WELCOME TO ALL PEOPLE 🙏

GLOBAL MISSION 2026 | BEYOND EXCELLENCE
👑

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR 🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT 🏢 FOUNDER & CEO 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH ❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH 🚀 STRATEGIC EMPIRE ARCHITECT ✅ START GLOBAL MISSION ON WHATSAPP 📞 🏠 KINGDOM HOME HUB 📩 VIP CONTACT HUB 🌍 GLOBAL ECOSYSTEM 🎓 BINDRA MENTORSHIP 💎 SOLUTIONS HUB 💰 YOUTAG BUSINESS PLAN 🔥 IDP STRATEGY 🚀 LEADS GURU ACCESS GLOBAL MISSION 2026
👑

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

0+ ENTREPRENEURS MENTORED 0+ YEARS OF ELITE EXPERIENCE 0% SECURE GLOBAL ECOSYSTEMS AUTHORIZED PARTNER | ID: BIRK076336 | GLOBAL WORLD MISSION 2026

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

🏰

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

ESTABLISHED 2024 | THE ORIGIN STORY

2016 – 2021: SURVIVING THE DARKNESS

JUNE 2016 MEIN JAB MAINE SHURUAT KI, TOH MERE PAAS SIRF ZERO KNOWLEDGE THI. MAINE EK IRON FACTORY MEIN KAAM SHURU KIYA, JAHAN MAHAUL NEGATIVE THA, PAR MERI WILL-POWER LOHE SE BHI MAZBOOT THI. EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR BANNE KA SAPNA WAHIN SE SHURU HUA.

"SENIORS AUR OWNER KI NEGATIVE BAATEIN SUN-SUN KAR EK WAQT AISA AAYA JAB MUJHE LAGA MERA FUTURE ANDHERA HAI. LEKIN EK EXPERT GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAHI HAI JO HAR MUSHKIL KO OPPORTUNITY MEIN BADAL DE."

🔥 THE SPARK OF HOPE: DR. VIVEK BINDRA SIR KA WO MANTRA: "PROBLEM PAR FOCUS KAROGE TOH PROBLEM BADI LAGEGI, SOLUTION PAR FOCUS KAROGE TOH RASTE DIKHENGE." US DIN MUJHE JEENE KA NAYA RASTA MIL GAYA.

GROUND-LEVEL EMPIRE BUILDING

🏗️ GROUND OPERATIONS

MAINE SEEKHA GAADI KA KAANTA, TOLL AUR EXCISE MANAGEMENT. HAR CHOTA KAAM KIYA TAQI EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI TARAH BUSINESS KA ASLI BASE SAMAJH SAKUN.

📈 MANAGEMENT MASTERY

WAHIN MAINE TALLY SEEKHI AUR GST HANDLE KIYA. FACTORY NE MUJHE ZERO SE MANAGEMENT LEVEL TAK PAHUNCHA DIYA. YEH EK TRUE GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI BUNIYAAD THI.

BHAGWAN NE MERI SUNI... AUR WAHI "SOLUTION MINDSET" 2021 MEIN CORPORATE BANKING KE RASTE KHOL GAYA. THE EVOLUTION INTO A GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAS UNSTOPPABLE.

GLOBAL WORLD MISSION 2026

GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR

📈

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

THE CORPORATE BREAKTHROUGH | JAN 2021

JAN 2021: THE BANKING SECTOR LEAP

BHAGWAN NE MERI SUNI AUR JANUARY 2021 MEIN MAINE DURGAPURA (JAIPUR) KE EK BADE BANK MEIN SALES OFFICER (LRO) JOIN KIYA. YEH MERI LIFE KA EK MUKHYA MODD THA JAHAN MAINE EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI TARAH SOCHNA SHURU KIYA.

BANKING SECTOR MEIN JIS LADKE KO BOLNA NAHI AATA THA, AAJ WO HIGH-LEVEL FINANCE AUR BADE CUSTOMERS KI DUNIYA MEIN THA. EK EXPERT GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR BANNE KI TRAINING MERI USSI SALES OFFICER KI JOURNEY MEIN CHUPI THI.

THE CORPORATE REALIZATION: "JOB AAPKO EK 10-TO-6 LOOP MEIN PHASA DETI HAI. EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAHI HAI JO BRANCH KI DEEWARON KO TOD KAR POORI DUNIYA (GLOBAL WORLD) KO APNA MARKET BANAYE."

ELITE PROFESSIONAL MASTERY

🏦 SALES & FINANCE OFFICER

BANKING SYSTEMS AUR FINANCIAL PRODUCTS KI GEHARI JANKARI LI. CUSTOMER RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT KO EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI SURGICAL ACCURACY SE SAMJHA.

🧠 MARKET PSYCHOLOGY

IN 1.5 SAALON MEIN MAINE SEEKHA KI CUSTOMER KI ASLI PROBLEM KYA HAI AUR KAISE UNHE EK GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR KI TARAH PERMANENT SOLUTION DIYA JATA HAI.

THE SHIFT TO GLOBAL MINDSET: DR. VIVEK BINDRA SIR KE VIDEOS NE DIMAAG KI DEEWARON KO TOD DIYA. THE EVOLUTION INTO A SUPREME GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR WAS COMPLETE. MISSION 2026 WAS BORN.

GLOBAL WORLD MISSION 2026

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR 🌍 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH | 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT
🏢 FOUNDER & CEO | 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH
❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH
🚀 BUILDING YOUR GLOBAL BUSINESS EMPIRE! 🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & STRATEGIC ADVISOR 🌍

BUILDING GLOBAL DIGITAL EMPIRES WITH UNLIMITED SEARCH & RESEARCH STRATEGIC SOLUTIONS.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH 🌍

ACCURATE WORLDWIDE BUSINESS SCALING AND GLOBAL MISSION 2026 EXECUTION.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT & BUSINESS ADVISOR 🧠

EXPERT BADA BUSINESS MENTORSHIP FOR FINANCIAL FREEDOM AND ACCURATE GROWTH ANYTIME.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🏢 FOUNDER & CEO | EMPIRE ARCHITECT 🏢

LEADERSHIP EXCELLENCE AUR CORPORATE STRUCTURE DESIGN JO AAPKO ASLI MAALIK BANAYE.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH & ASSET PROTECTOR 🏡

LEGACY WEALTH AUR BULLET-PROOF PROPERTY INVESTMENT STRATEGIES FOR 6 GENERATIONS.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS ❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH ❤️

HIGH-CHIEVERS KE LIYE GHAR KI SHANTI AUR PRIVATE WORLD KA GUPT SAMADHAN ANYTIME.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS
EYES CLOSED ACTION Bina sawal kiye mentor aur system par 100% bharosa aur fast execution. 1000 DAYS VISION Raato-raat ameer banne ke bajaye 3 saal ka solid empire building mindset. GLOBAL BRAND BUILDING Local dhande ko international level ki pehchaan aur izzat dilana. AI-AUTOMATION BOSS Business ko digital systems aur AI ke bharose Auto-pilot par chalana. GLOBAL ECOSYSTEM Ek hi jagah par learning, earning aur networking ka vishal jaal.

🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH & CONSULTANT & ADVISOR 🌍

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🎯 TARGET AUDIENCE (PURE PEOPLE)

ALL STUDENTS (THE FUTURE)

Arts, Commerce, Science ya Dropouts. Hum aapko degree nahi, Digital Money Making Skills dete hain jo duniya mein kahin bhi kaam aayengi. Career set karne ka asli rasta.

MEDICAL PROFESSIONALS

Doctors aur Nurses jo apne clinic ko automatic system par chalana chahte hain aur apni personal brand value ko global scale par le jana chahte hain. AI in Healthcare solutions.

LEGAL & FINANCE EXPERTS

Advocates, CAs aur Tax Consultants jo traditional practice se hatkar 'Digital Advisory' aur 'High-End Consulting' model mein shift hona chahte hain aur global clients handle karna chahte hain.

REAL ESTATE GURUS

Builders, Colonizers aur Architects jo modern digital marketing ke zariye badi deals aur premium global clients ko attract karna chahte hain. Asset building ki masterclass.

INDUSTRIAL GIANTS

Factory Owners aur Manufacturers jo apni production aur supply chain ko AI ke saath integrate karke global exports mein dhoom machana chahte hain. Manufacturing 4.0 strategy.

HOSPITALITY & WELLNESS

Hotel, Resort, Gym, Spa aur Club owners jo apne footfall ko badhana aur customer experience ko ekdum Premium (Shahi) banana chahte hain automatic systems se.

RETAIL & E-COMMERCE

Chhote shopkeepers se lekar bade wholesalers tak, jo apne dhande ko offline se online (Global Marketplace) par le jaana chahte hain aur 24/7 sales engine banana chahte hain.

EMPLOYEES & PROFESSIONALS

Govt, MNC, IT Professionals aur Retired log jo apne experience ko monetize karke ek consulting career ya passive income shuru karna chahte hain. Exit strategy expert advice.

🚨 THE MINDSET SHORTING (CHUNAV)

❌ KONSE NAHI CHAHIYE? (REJECT)
  • FREE LOVERS: Jo value premium chahte hain par invest nahi karte.
  • SHORTCUT HUNTERS: Jo raato-raat ameer banna chahte hain.
  • OVER-SMART MINDS: Jo naya seekhne ke liye taiyar nahi hain.
  • EXCUSE MAKERS: Jo halaat aur kismat ko zimmedar thehrate hain.
✅ KONSE CHAHIYE? (INVITE)
  • 1000 DAYS VISION: Jinke paas sabar aur bada vision hai.
  • EYES CLOSED ACTION: Jo mentor par trust karke execute karte hain.
  • PER-SECOND LEARNER: Jinka dimaag naye trends ke liye khula hai.
  • DECISION MAKERS: Jo mauke ko pehchan kar turant action lete hain.

item.content:encoded:
👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🌐 GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM 🌐

AUTOMATE | SCALE | CONQUER

STOP RUNNING YOUR BUSINESS. START OWNING A GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM.
WE PROVIDE THE DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE TO TRANSFORM YOUR LOCAL PRESENCE INTO A GLOBAL POWERHOUSE.
MISSION 2026 IS ABOUT 100% AUTOMATION AND ABSOLUTE TRANSPARENCY.

🛡️

100% Transparency

Google aur log sachaai dhundte hain. No hidden traps, pure system-driven business.

🧠

System-Driven

People love efficiency. Your business runs on billionaire logic, not luck.

Made in Bharat

Global standard, Indian roots. This builds massive emotional trust for Jaipur & World.

🌐 GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM KI TAQAT 🌐

🚀 GOOGLE STANDARDS AUR GLOBAL BUSINESS LOGIC KE SAATH TAIYAR KIYA GAYA INFRASTRUCTURE, JO AAPKE LOCAL BUSINESS KO "GLOBAL EMPIRE" BANAYEGA. 🚀

🌍 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

Global Connectivity 🛰️

📈 EK AISA INTERNATIONAL DIGITAL JAAL JAHAN AAPKA DATA 24/7 WORLDWIDE SECURE REHTA HAI. GOOGLE KI SPEED AUR GLOBAL BUSINESS CONNECTIVITY KA MEL. 📈

💼 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

Global Asset Vault 🏦

💎 AAPKE BUSINESS ASSETS KI SURAKSHA GLOBAL STANDARDS PAR HOTI HAI. EK DUM ORGANIZED, SCALABLE AUR PROFESSIONAL BUSINESS BACKEND SYSTEM. 💎

👑 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

Global Authority 🏛️

⭐ EK AISA INTERFACE JO LONDON SE LEKAR JAIPUR TAK "WORLD CLASS" DIKHTA HAI. GLOBAL BUSINESS MEIN TRUST HI AAPKI ASLI DOULAT HAI. ⭐

👔 READY FOR GLOBAL MISSION 2026? 👔

👑 "BINA SYSTEM KE BUSINESS SIRF EK NAUKRI HAI.
GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM KE SAATH YE EK EMPIRE HAI." 👑

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🌐 GLOBAL MISSION 2026 🌐

🚀 TRANSFORMING BHARAT | CONNECTING THE WORLD 🌎

01

Full Automation 🤖

📈 BUSINESS KO INSAANI GALTIYON SE MUKT KARKE 100% SYSTEM-DRIVEN BANANA. GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM KA ASLI POWER AUTOMATION HAI. 📈

02

Global Outreach 🛰️

🇮🇳 BHARAT KE HAR KONE SE LEKAR GLOBAL MARKETS TAK APNA ECOSYSTEM PHAILANA. HIND KA NAAM DUNIYA KE BUSINESS MAP PAR CHAMKANA. 🇮🇳

03

Digital Leadership 👔

👑 NAYE ENTREPRENEURS KO SYSTEM KI TAQAT SE "GLOBAL DIGITAL LEADERS" BANANA. HAR BHARATIYA BUSINESS KO EK EMPIRE MEIN BADALNA. 👑

🛡️ OUR COMMITMENT: 100% ETHICAL, TRANSPARENT &
RESULT-ORIENTED GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM. 🛡️

💉 KHANDANI GAREEBI AUR BEROZGARI KA ZEHAR KAB TAK PIYOGE? 💉

⚠️ "AGAR AAJ KHUD KA GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM NAHI BANAYA, TOH AGLE 50 SAAL DUSRON KE LIYE MAZDOORI KAROGE!" ⚠️

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH | 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT | 🏢 FOUNDER & CEO | 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH | ❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH 🛑 STOP: NO FREEBIES 💸 "SAB KUCH FREE MILEGA?" – YE SOCH HI AAPKI BARBADI KA KARAN HAI! JO LOG FREE MANGTE HAIN, UNKA DIMAAG SIRF "GULAAMI" KE LIYE BANA HAI. AGAR AAP APNI GROWTH PAR INVESTMENT NAHI KAR SAKTE, TOH YE GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM AAPKE LIYE NAHI HAI. DUNIYA MEIN KUCH BHI FREE NAHI MILTA, JO MILTA HAI WO KACHRA HOTA HAI. 🗑️ ⏳ GLOBAL TIMELINE 📉 AMIR BANNE MEIN KITNA WAQT LAGEGA? 📉 YE KOI "RAATO-RAAT AMIR BANNE" KI SCHEME NAHI HAI, YE EK ASLI AUR SOLID GLOBAL BUSINESS HAI. ISME AAPKO 1000 DIN (5 SAAL) DENE HONGE. SHURUAT MEIN 100% ACTIVE MEHNAT KARNI HOGI, TAB JAAKAR SYSTEM AAPKO 100% RESULT AUR AZADI DEGA. 🚀 👨‍🏫 SHAHI TRAINING 🎓 TRAINING ZARURI KYUN HAI? 🎓 JAISE EK DOCTOR KI DAWAI AUR TEACHER KI SIKH PAR AMAL KARNA HOTA HAI, WAISE HI MORNING & EVENING TRAINING HAMARE SYSTEM KI BACKBONE HAI. AGAR AAPNE UNGLI PAKDI HAI, TOH GBE SYSTEM KO POORI TARAH FOLLOW KARNA HOGA TABHI KAMYABI MILEGI. 🧠 🛡️ 100% LEGAL & CERTIFIED 🏛️ KYA MERA PAISA AUR FUTURE SAFE HAI? 🏛️ HUM MCA (MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS) AUR GOVERNMENT KI DIRECT SELLING GUIDELINES KE TAHAT REGISTERED HAIN. YE SIRF EK CAREER NAHI, BALKI AAPKI AANE WALI 4 SE 6 GENERATIONS KE LIYE EK SECURE ASSET AUR LEGACY HAI. 🛡️

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM 🌍 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
🌍 GLOBAL BUSINESS COACH | 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT
🏢 FOUNDER & CEO | 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH

ACCURATE WORLDWIDE BUSINESS SCALING AND GLOBAL MISSION 2026 EXECUTION.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🧠 INDEPENDENT BUSINESS CONSULTANT & BUSINESS ADVISOR 🧠

EXPERT BADA BUSINESS MENTORSHIP FOR FINANCIAL FREEDOM AND ACCURATE GROWTH ANYTIME.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🏢 FOUNDER & CEO | EMPIRE ARCHITECT 🏢

LEADERSHIP EXCELLENCE AUR CORPORATE STRUCTURE DESIGN JO AAPKO ASLI MAALIK BANAYE.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS 🏡 REAL ESTATE COACH & ASSET PROTECTOR 🏡

LEGACY WEALTH AUR BULLET-PROOF PROPERTY INVESTMENT STRATEGIES FOR 6 GENERATIONS.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS ❤️ RELATIONSHIP & INTIMACY COACH ❤️

HIGH-CHIEVERS KE LIYE GHAR KI SHANTI AUR PRIVATE WORLD KA GUPT SAMADHAN ANYTIME.

👇 READ MORE DEEP DETAILS

Is 🌐 Global Business Ecosystem 🌐 Mein Kaun Kaun Aa Sakta Hai?

BHARAT KE NO. 1 GLOBAL BUSINESS ECOSYSTEM KA DARWAZA HAR US VYAKTI KE LIYE KHULA HAI JO AAJ KE DIGITAL YUG MEIN PEECHE NAHI REHNA CHAHTA. HAMARA INFRASTRUCTURE GOOGLE KE GLOBAL STANDARDS PAR TAIYAR KIYA GAYA HAI.

🎓 STUDENTS

JO SIRF DEGREE KE BHAROSE NAHI BAITHNA CHAHTE. HUM AAPKO PROFESSIONAL SKILLS SIKHATE HAIN. PADHAI KE SAATH APNA AUTOMATED BUSINESS SHURU KAREIN.

💼 JOB HOLDERS

JO APNI BORING 9-TO-5 NAUKRI SE AZADI CHAHTE HAIN. HAMARA PLATFORM AAPKO EK SIDE BUSINESS EMPIRE KHADA KARNE MEIN MADAD KARTA HAI.

🏬 BUSINESS OWNERS

JO APNE LOCAL VYAPAR KO DIGITALIZATION KI TAQAT SE GLOBAL BRAND BANANA CHAHTE HAIN. HUM AAPKE BUSINESS KO AUTOMATE KARTE HAIN.

🏠 HOUSE-WIVES

GHAR KI ZIMMEDARIYON KE SAATH APNI PEHCHAN BANAYEIN. DIGITAL OWNERSHIP SE GHAR BAITHE RESPECTABLE CAREER AUR AZADI HASIL KAREIN.

👨‍🦳 RETIRED PERSONS

APNI SECOND INNINGS KO FINANCIALLY STRONG BANAYEIN. HAMARA RESULT-ORIENTED SYSTEM KOI BHI ASANI SE OPERATE KAR SAKTA HAI.

🛑 LEKIN... MUJHE SIRF "CHUNINDA" LOG CHAHIYE!

"MAIN HAR KISI KE SAATH APNA WAQT KHARAB NAHI KARTA. MAIN SIRF UNHE SELECT KARTA HOON JINME KUCH BADA KARNE KA JIGAR HO."

🧠 BUSINESS OWNERSHIP MINDSET: MUJHE WO LOG CHAHIYE JO NAUKRI WALI GULAM MANSIKTA KO CHHOD KAR KHUD KA MAALIK BANNE KI SOCH RAKHTE HON. 📖 LEARNING ATTITUDE: DIGITAL DUNIYA ROZ BADALTI HAI. MUJHE WO LOG CHAHIYE JO HAMISHA SIKHNE KE LIYE TAIYAR HON. ⏳ LONG-TERM COMMITMENT: YE KOI RAATO-RAAT AMIR BANNE KI SCHEME NAHI HAI. ISME AAPKO KAM SE KAM 1000 DIN (5 SAAL) TAK SYSTEM KE SAATH TIKE REHNA HOGA. 💰 SELF-INVESTMENT: DUNIYA MEIN KUCH BHI "FREE" NAHI HOTA. MUJHE WO LOG CHAHIYE JINME APNI LIFE BADALNE KE LIYE INVESTMENT KARNE KA SAHAS HO. 🤝 ROYAL ETHICS: HUM YAHAN EK GLOBAL LEGACY BUILD KAR RAHE HAIN. ISLIYE MUJHE IMAANDAAR AUR VALUES PAR CHALNE WALE LOG HI CHAHIYE. AGAR AAP TAIYAR HAIN, TOH HI SWAGAT HAI! 👑 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 | BEYOND EXCELLENCE
Strategic Association

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🔥 VISIT OFFICIAL BADA BUSINESS PORTAL 🔥

AAPKA BUSINESS AAPKA "GULAM" HAI? 🛑

AGAR AAPKA BUSINESS AAPKE BINA NAHI CHAL SAKTA, TOH AAP MALIK NAHI, APNE HI OFFICE KE SABSE BADE MAZDOOR HAIN!

📁 DIGITAL DUKAN 📁 LEADERSHIP FUNNEL PROGRAM 📁 CASH GROWTH PROFIT 📁 IDEA TO IPO 📁 NICE ANALYSIS 📁 BADA BUSINESS COACH 📁 DIGITAL WORKSHOP 📁 BUSINESS TALES GLOBAL MISSION 2026 • JAIPUR • BHARAT • WORLD
👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

KAB TAK DOOSRON KI KAMYABI DEKHOGE? 🛑

"YADI AAPKE PAAS DIGITAL SKILL NAHI HAI, TOH AAP AANE WALE KAL KE DIGITAL MAZDOOR BANNE KI TAIYARI KAR RAHE HAIN. APNI SKILLS KO UPGRADE KARIYE AUR AUTOMATION KA FAYDA UTHAIYE!"

🚀 GET STARTED WITH IDIGITALPRENEUR 🔒 SECURE ACCESS | GLOBAL DIGITAL HUB | JAIPUR • BHARAT • WORLD
👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

KAB TAK LEADS KE LIYE BHIK MAANGOGE? 🛑

"YADI AAPKO BECHNA NAHI AATA, TOH AAP HAMISHA DOOSRON KE BANAYE HUYE SYSTEM KE GULAM BANE RAHENGE. LEADS GENERATE KARNA AUR UNHE CLOSE KARNA SIKHIYE, TABHI ASLI AZADI MILEGI!"

🔥 REGISTER NOW ON LEADS GURU 🔒 OFFICIAL REGISTRATION PORTAL | GLOBAL SALES HUB | 2026
👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

KHARCHA KAROGE YA KAMAYI? 💸

"DUNIYA KHARCHA KARKE GAREEB HO RAHI HAI, AUR SAMAJHDAAR LOG USI KHARCHE KO INVESTMENT BANA KAR AMEER BAN RAHE HAIN. YOUTAG KE SAATH APNE HAR KHARCHE SE INCOME GENERATE KIJIYE!"

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 OFFICIAL ID: 2043272 🏆 GEETA DEVI KHANDELWAL OFFICIAL ID: 29043533 🚀 NISHANT VERMA OFFICIAL ID: 98815302 OFFICIAL TEAM ACCESS PORTAL | GLOBAL INCOME NETWORK | 2026
Digital Empire Architecture

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🚀 THE 360° DIGITAL CONSTRUCTION

JAB AAP EK DOMAIN & HOSTING LETE HAIN, TOH AAP SIRF EK WEBSITE NAHI BANA RAHE HOTE—AAP APNE EMPIRE KI BUNIYAAD RAKHTE HAIN.

CHAHE AAP EK NRIs HON JINHE INDIA MEIN TRUSTED SETUP CHAHIYE, EK DOCTOR HON JISE CLINIC AUTOMATION CHAHIYE, YA EK LEGACY BUSINESS JISE MODERN BANNA HAI—MAIN AAPKE LIYE POORA "ALL-OVER" SETUP KARKE DETA HOON.

STEP 1: SELECT YOUR GLOBAL FOUNDATION GLOBAL PRICING ($)

GLOBAL VISIONARY PLAN

GET FOUNDATION → GLOBAL PRICING ($)

GLOBAL GROWTH PRO

GET FOUNDATION → INDIA PRICING (₹)

BHARAT MISSION SETUP

GET FOUNDATION → INDIA PRICING (₹)

IBC GROWTH PLAN

GET FOUNDATION →

STEP 2: HANDOVER TO THE ARCHITECT

EK BAAR FOUNDATION SELECT HO JAYE, TAB BAAKI KA **ADVANCED CODING, SALES AUTOMATION AUR BUSINESS STRATEGY** DR. RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC HANDLE KARENGE.

🟢 CONNECT FOR FULL SETUP GLOBAL TECH STRATEGIST | CUSTOM CODING | FULL STACK AUTOMATION
WELLNESS & GYM AUTOMATION ARCHITECT

👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

🚨 KAB TAK APNE GYM KE GULAAM RAHOGE?

AGAR AAPKA COUNTER AAPKE BINA NAHI CHALTA, TOH AAP FOUNDER NAHI, APNE HI OFFICE KE MAZDOOR HAIN. FITPLUSCRM KE SAATH APNE DHANDHE KO 100% AUTOPILOT PAR SET KARIYE.

"HUM AAPKE FITNESS BUSINESS KO 'SYSTEM-DRIVEN' EMPIRE MEIN BADALTE HAIN." 🔐 SMART ACCESS BIOMETRIC & QR ATTENDANCE. EXPIRED MEMBERS AUTOMATICALLY BLOCKED. 💰 AUTO BILLING GST INVOICING & RENEWAL REMINDERS VIA WHATSAPP / SMS. 📊 LEAD CRM NEVER MISS A FOLLOW-UP. CONVERT EVERY INQUIRY INTO A LOYAL MEMBER. 🍏 DIET & WORKOUT MOBILE APP ACCESS FOR MEMBERS TO TRACK THEIR PROGRESS & DIET PLANS. 🏢 MULTI-BRANCH MANAGE 10+ BRANCHES FROM ONE SCREEN. NO PHYSICAL PRESENCE REQUIRED. 🛒 GYM POS SUPPLEMENT SALES & INVENTORY MANAGEMENT AT YOUR FINGERTIPS. INTEGRATED WITH: eSSL | BIOMAX | ZKTECO | SMS | WHATSAPP | SMTP

FREE FOR STARTUPS (LIMITED TIME OFFER!)

🟢 BOOK MY FREE DEMO NOW OFFICIAL CHANNEL PARTNER | POWERED BY FITPLUSCRM.COM | 2026

item.title: 👑 PRIVACY POLICY: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
item.dc:creator: RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL
item.content:encoded:
Last Updated: April 13, 2026

rajeshkhandelwalofficial.com par aapka swagat hai. Hamara Global Mission 2026 sirf business coaching nahi, balki ek surakshit aur bharosemand digital ecosystem banana hai.

1. Hum Data Kyun Lete Hain? (The Deep Purpose)

Hum aapka personal data (Jaise Name, Contact Number, aur Business Details) isliye lete hain taaki hum aapke business aur life ke Deep Pain Points (Dard) ko samajh sakein. Hum is data ka upyog aapki problems ka Deep Solution aur personalized coaching dene ke liye karte hain.

2. Data Suraksha: 800% Safe aur Secure

Aapka data hamari sabse badi priority hai. Hum guarantee dete hain ki aapka data hamare paas 100% se lekar 800% tak Safe aur Secure hai. Hum aapki kisi bhi jankari ko kisi third-party ko sell ya rent nahi karte hain.

3. Aapka Adhikaar (Data Deletion)

Hum aapki privacy ka samman karte hain. Agar aap chahte hain ki hum aapka data apne system se puri tarah hata dein, toh aap humein kabhi bhi email kar sakte hain. Hum bina kisi deri ke aapka data delete kar denge.

4. Cookies aur Digital Tracking

Website ki speed aur user experience ko behtar banane ke liye hum Cookies aur Google Analytics ka istemal karte hain. Isse humein website ko aapke liye aur bhi smooth banane mein madad milti hai.

5. External Links (Trust Partners)

Hamari website par Bada Business (Dr. Vivek Bindra) aur hamare social media handles ke links ho sakte hain. Hum sirf unhi platforms ke sath judte hain jin par humein pura bharosa hai.

6. Contact Us (Official Support)

Agar aapko apni privacy, data security, ya Terms & Conditions ke baare mein koi bhi sawal puchna hai, toh aap humein hamari official email par contact karein: 📧 INFO@RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL.COM

item.title: 👑 TERMS AND CONDITIONS (नियम और शर्तें) 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
item.dc:creator: RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL
item.content:encoded:
👑 TERMS AND CONDITIONS (नियम और शर्तें)

Official Brand: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

Official Email: info@rajeshkhandelwalofficial.com

WhatsApp Support:

🏛️ 1. BRAND OWNERSHIP (ब्रांड का मालिकाना हक)

  • English: This brand, 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑, is 800% owned by 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑. Any use of the brand name, logo, images, or videos requires official written permission.
  • Hindi: यह ब्रांड, 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑, पूरी तरह (800%) 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 के स्वामित्व में है। मेरी आधिकारिक लिखित अनुमति के बिना ब्रांड नाम, लोगो, फोटो या वीडियो का उपयोग करना सख्त मना है।

🛡️ 2. MISUSE & PUBLIC NOTICE (गलत उपयोग और सूचना)

  • English: If anyone misuses this brand, a formal notice will be issued. We reserve the right to inform the public via digital platforms and videos about such unauthorized activities to protect people from losses.
  • Hindi: यदि कोई मेरे ब्रांड का गलत इस्तेमाल करता है, तो उसे नोटिस दिया जाएगा। लोगों को नुकसान से बचाने के लिए हम डिजिटल प्लेटफॉर्म और वीडियो के माध्यम से जनता को सूचित करेंगे कि फलाना व्यक्ति ब्रांड का गलत उपयोग कर रहा है।

🔞 3. AGE & VERIFICATION (आयु और सत्यापन)

  • English: To start any business or work with our ecosystem, you must be 18+ years old with mandatory ID verification.
  • Hindi: हमारे साथ बिज़नेस या काम शुरू करने के लिए आपकी उम्र कम से कम 18 साल होनी चाहिए और ID Verification (पहचान पत्र की जांच) अनिवार्य है।

🌍 4. PLATFORM RULES & RESPONSIBILITY (नियम और जिम्मेदारी)

  • English: Users must follow the T&C of associated platforms (Bada Business, Youtag, etc.). Success depends 100% on your learning and hard work. Dr. Rajesh is not responsible for any losses if the user fails to put in effort.
  • Hindi: आपको हमारे साथ जुड़े प्लेटफार्म (Bada Business, Youtag आदि) के नियमों को मानना होगा। सफलता आपकी अपनी मेहनत पर निर्भर है। अगर आप काम नहीं करते, तो किसी भी परिणाम के लिए मेरी कोई जिम्मेदारी नहीं होगी।

🤝 5. DISPUTE RESOLUTION (विवादों का निपटारा)

  • English: Any disputes will first be resolved through Face-to-Face Online Meetings (Video Calls). If unresolved, the legal jurisdiction will strictly be Jaipur, Rajasthan (India).
  • Hindi: किसी भी विवाद को समय बचाने के लिए सबसे पहले Online Face-to-Face Meeting (वीडियो कॉल) के जरिए सुलझाया जाएगा। यदि समाधान नहीं होता है, तो कानूनी क्षेत्र केवल जयपुर, राजस्थान (भारत) ही होगा।

🛠️ 6. RIGHT TO CHANGE (बदलाव का अधिकार)

  • English: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 holds 100% authority to change these terms at any time.
  • Hindi: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 के पास इन शर्तों को किसी भी समय बदलने का 100% अधिकार सुरक्षित है।

item.title: 👑 REFUND AND CANCELLATION POLICY (रिफंड और रद्दीकरण नीति) 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
item.dc:creator: RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL
item.content:encoded:
👑 REFUND AND CANCELLATION POLICY (रिफंड और रद्दीकरण नीति)

Official Brand: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

Official Email: info@rajeshkhandelwalofficial.com

WhatsApp Support: https://wa.me/917611967229

🏛️ 1. NO REFUND POLICY (कोई रिफंड नहीं)

  • English: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 provides high-value professional consulting, digital systems, and coaching services. Once a service is purchased, a session is booked, or digital access is granted, no refunds will be issued under any circumstances. We invest our expertise and time to ensure your success.
  • Hindi: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 हाई-वैल्यू प्रोफेशनल कंसल्टिंग, डिजिटल सिस्टम और कोचिंग सेवाएं प्रदान करता है। एक बार सेवा खरीदने, सेशन बुक करने या डिजिटल एक्सेस मिलने के बाद, किसी भी स्थिति में कोई रिफंड (पैसा वापसी) नहीं दिया जाएगा। हम आपकी सफलता के लिए अपना अनुभव और समय निवेश करते हैं।

🛡️ 2. AFFILIATE PLATFORMS (अन्य प्लेटफार्म्स के नियम)

  • English: For third-party platforms joined through our links (e.g., Bada Business, Youtag), their own specific refund and cancellation policies will apply. 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 is not liable for any refund claims related to these external companies.
  • Hindi: हमारे माध्यम से जुड़े अन्य प्लेटफार्म (जैसे Bada Business, Youtag आदि) के लिए उनकी अपनी रिफंड और कैंसलेशन नीतियां लागू होंगी। उन बाहरी कंपनियों से संबंधित किसी भी रिफंड दावे के लिए 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 जिम्मेदार नहीं होगा।

🚫 3. CANCELLATION RULES (रद्दीकरण के नियम)

  • English: You are free to stop using our learning systems or skip scheduled coaching sessions, but no previous payments will be reimbursed or adjusted for future services.
  • Hindi: आप हमारे लर्निंग सिस्टम का उपयोग बंद करने या निर्धारित कोचिंग सेशन छोड़ने के लिए स्वतंत्र हैं, लेकिन पहले किए गए किसी भी भुगतान को वापस नहीं किया जाएगा और न ही भविष्य की सेवाओं के लिए एडजस्ट किया जाएगा।

📞 4. SUPPORT (सहायता)

  • English: For any technical issues regarding your digital access, please contact us at info@rajeshkhandelwalofficial.com within 24 hours.
  • Hindi: डिजिटल एक्सेस से संबंधित किसी भी तकनीकी समस्या के लिए, कृपया 24 घंटे के भीतर info@rajeshkhandelwalofficial.com पर हमसे संपर्क करें।

item.title: 👑 DISCLAIMER (अस्वीकरण) 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑
item.dc:creator: RAJESHKHANDELWALOFFICIAL
item.content:encoded:
👑 DISCLAIMER (अस्वीकरण)

Official Brand: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑

1. No Income Guarantee (कमाई की कोई गारंटी नहीं)

  • English: All systems and learning provided by 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 are for educational purposes. We provide the roadmap, but success depends 100% on your hard work and implementation. We do not guarantee any fixed income.
  • Hindi: मेरे द्वारा दिए गए सभी सिस्टम और शिक्षा केवल मार्गदर्शन के लिए हैं। सफलता पूरी तरह से आपकी अपनी मेहनत और अमल करने पर निर्भर करती है। मैं किसी भी तरह की निश्चित कमाई की गारंटी नहीं देता।

2. Not a Medical or Financial Advisor (कोई डॉक्टरी या वित्तीय सलाह नहीं)

  • English: I am a Business, Real Estate, and Relationship Coach. My advice is based on personal expertise and should not be treated as a substitute for professional medical, psychological, or financial legal advice. Always consult a specialist for medical issues.
  • Hindi: मैं एक बिजनेस, रियल एस्टेट और रिलेशनशिप कोच हूं। मेरी सलाह व्यक्तिगत अनुभव पर आधारित है। इसे किसी डॉक्टri या मनोवैज्ञानिक इलाज का विकल्प न समझें। स्वास्थ्य संबंधी समस्याओं के लिए हमेशा डॉक्टर से ही संपर्क करें।

3. Personal Responsibility (आपकी जिम्मेदारी)

  • English: 👑 DR RAJESH KHANDELWAL IBC 👑 provides solutions, but the user is responsible for how they use this information. Any loss occurring from lack of effort or wrong implementation is not our responsibility.
  • Hindi: मैं समाधान और रास्ता दे सकता हूं, लेकिन उस पर कैसे काम करना है यह यूजर की जिम्मेदारी है। मेहनत न करने या गलत तरीके से काम करने पर होने वाले किसी भी नुकसान के लिए मेरी कोई जिम्मेदारी नहीं होगी।
